title: Subitem Search?
excerpt:
is there a way to see subitems when you do a search. 
like when I am searching for a person I only see the pulses they are apart of not the subitems they are apart of.

posts.author: Stuart1745 (Stuart Rampy)
posts.cookedHtml:
is there a way to see subitems when you do a search.
like when I am searching for a person I only see the pulses they are apart of not the subitems they are apart of.

posts.author: lrobert (Ludovic ROBERT)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
The search is marked as done on the subitems product plan.
